title: Junior IT Workplace Administrator – EMEA
description:
**Junior IT Workplace Administrator – EMEA**

**Location:** Milan, Italy (Office\-based)  
**Type:** Full\-Time  
**Reports to:** IT Workplace Administrator – EMEA

**Salary:** EURO 23,000\.00 \- 25,000\.00

**About the Role**

As our **Junior IT Workplace Administrator in the Milan Office,** you will be the heartbeat of technical support for our Milan office and a vital member of the Regional EMEA IT Workplace team. This is a unique opportunity to support a diverse and adventurous internal user base across various environments, ranging from corporate offices to remote camps, hotels, and even river boats. This role will have a regional focus and provide support across the EMEA region.

You will provide high\-quality 1st and 2nd line support, ensuring that our team members can focus on delivering world\-class travel experiences with minimal technical disruption.

**Key Responsibilities**

* **Support \& Incident Management:** Manage and resolve support queries via the IT service desk, phone, email, Teams, and in\-person. You will act as the first point of contact and escalate complex issues within the Global IT Team to ensure timely resolutions.
* **Onboarding \& Offboarding:** Coordinate with local teams to manage the full lifecycle of employee accounts, including hardware and software provisioning for new starters and secure offboarding for leavers.
* **Asset Management:** Maintain rigorous asset and user lists. You will manage the lifecycle of hardware assets according to company guidelines, including procurement and decommissioning.
* **System Maintenance:** Ensure all user equipment is properly maintained through regular hardware servicing and software patching/updates.
* **Collaboration \& Projects:** Assist the Global IT Infrastructure team with regional projects and system upgrades. Proactively recommend technology improvements to keep the company efficient and competitive.
* **Documentation:** Create and maintain clear technical documentation for the internal IT team, as well as user\-friendly Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs) and training guides for staff.
* **System Monitoring:** Proactively monitor key systems to identify and mitigate potential issues before they impact the business.
* **Support** existing AKTG properties, as well as other regional properties such as river boats.

**Experience \& Qualifications**

**Essential Skills:**

* **Technical Proficiency:** Knowledge of Windows OS and the Microsoft Office 365 Suite.
* **Mobile Management:** Experience using and managing iOS and Android devices
* **Communication:** Fluent in English (both written and spoken) with the ability to explain technical concepts to non\-technical users.
* **Operational Excellence:** Strong ability to prioritise tasks in a fast\-paced environment with high attention to detail.

**Personal Attributes:**

* A desire to support colleagues and contribute to a positive team culture through strong interpersonal relationships.
* **Process Innovator:** Combines a hands\-on approach to problem\-solving with a genuine desire to evolve and improve current ways of working.
* **Hybrid\-Ready Communicator:** Comfortable navigating the complexities of a distributed workforce and managing remote reporting relationships with ease.
* **Adaptable Change Leader:** Seeking a resilient individual capable of navigating evolving priorities and championing organisational transformation through a proactive, solution\-oriented mindset.

**Why Join Us?**

You will be part of a global team that values innovation and efficiency. We offer a dynamic work environment where your contributions directly impact the success of our regional operations.

**Equal Opportunities:** We are an equal opportunities employer and welcome applications from all suitably qualified persons regardless of their race, sex, disability, religion/belief, sexual orientation, or age.

Retribuzione: €23\.000,00 \- €25\.000,00 all'anno

description:

 Save for Later


**Job Description**


**Role Purpose**


The resource will join the Media team with the goal of contributing to the development and optimization of digital advertising activities in the Awareness and Consideration phases, supporting the planning and evolution of the digital media mix


The role involves the planning, management, and optimization of digital campaigns on the main paid channels, with the objective of maximizing qualified reach, engagement, and traffic to the bank’s properties


The person will work closely with the media agency and with internal brand and growth teams to ensure strategic coherence, media mix efficiency, and continuous development of new approaches


**Key Responsibilities**


* Campaign Planning and Management
	+ Support the planning and implementation of digital campaigns dedicated to the Awareness and Consideration phases, contributing to the definition of audiences, formats, and activation touchpoints
	+ Manage operational coordination with the media agency and external partners for campaign execution
	+ Manage and optimize relevant media budgets on the main digital/social channels
	+ Collaborate with the Media team to ensure that campaign activation is consistent with insights and directions coming from the Marketing Mix Model
* Performance Monitoring
	+ Monitor campaign delivery and contribute to continuous optimization on the main KPIs (reach, frequency, CTR, engagement, qualified traffic, etc.)
	+ Analyze campaign performance and produce periodic reports for mid and top management
	+ Analyze performance to identify insights useful for guiding media optimizations and decisions
* Digital Innovation
	+ Support and contribute to the development of test \& learn activities on audiences, formats, platforms, channels, and creatives
	+ Contribute to the introduction of new digital touchpoints and media activation solutions
	+ Monitor market trends, platform evolution, and new opportunities in digital advertising
	+ Contribute to the development of an increasingly audience‑based approach to media planning, supporting the definition and activation of relevant audience segments
* Cross Team Collaboration
	+ Collaborate continuously with the Brand team to ensure coherence between communication strategy, creative messages, and media activation
	+ Collaborate with the insights and analytics teams to align campaign execution with key market trends
	+ Support alignment between Awareness and Consideration activities and performance marketing initiatives

**Required Technical Skills**


* Media Planning and Digital Advertising
	+ Advanced knowledge of the main digital advertising channels
	+ Ability to understand and develop digital media planning activities
	+ Familiarity with reach, frequency, and multi‑channel planning logic
* Campaign Management Platforms
	+ Experience with the main digital campaign management platforms, including:
		- Meta
		- Google
		- YouTube
		- TikTok
		- DSPs and programmatic platforms
	+ Understanding of delivery, optimization, and campaign management logic across different platforms
* Analysis
	+ Excellent ability to analyze campaign data
	+ Excellent ability to aggregate complex data from different platforms and integrate them to produce analyses and insights useful for planning decisions
	+ Ability to identify signals and insights
	+ Ability to produce reporting at various levels of depth
* Excellent command of Microsoft Office tools, especially Excel for data analysis and PowerPoint for building presentations and insight summaries
* Familiarity with AI and automation tools applied to digital marketing and data analysis

**Seniority**


3–5 years of experience in similar roles at:


* Fintech companies
* Digital banking
* Media agencies

**Soft Skills**


* Strong results orientation
* Precision and attention to detail in managing activities
* Ability to work in cross‑functional contexts
* Curiosity toward innovation and developments in digital advertising
* Excellent written and verbal communication skills
* Stakeholder management and cross‑functional working abilities
* Autonomy, proactivity, and impact orientation

**Contract offer:**


**Working conditions:** Permanent employment contract


**Working hours:** Full time (37 hours per week)


**Applicable Collective Labour Agreement:** National Collective Labour Agreement for employees in the credit sector (NCLA)


**Location:** Milan


**Annual base salary starting from**: 48\.000 €


**Variable remuneration:** in line with the applicable remuneration policies (with a target based on the role, outcomes linked to the Group, Business line/function, and individual performance)


Our compensation approach is built on objective, gender\-neutral criteria aligned with the role’s core requirements. That said, we believe talent goes beyond any framework: your total reward package will be tailored to reflect your unique experience, skills, and potential, ensuring we fully recognize the value you bring.


**The benefits of joining ING**


In addition to being a part of a great team, working in a fun and innovative environment, we offer:


* Flexible Smart Working
* Competitive base salaries and performance\-based bonuses
* Meal vouchers and corporate restaurant and bar
* Health insurance and Accident insurance
* Pension fund and welfare plan
* Diverse cultures \& Innovative mindsets
* International Environnent and Talent Program
* Commitment to sustainability
* Lots of training development opportunities to help you grow
* Lots of moments dedicated to physical and mental well\-being
* A special day off when it is your birthday: we call it \#doyourbirthday!
* And of course, we can’t forget free water \& coffee at the office!

**About ING**


ING offers many opportunities to build a diverse and rewarding career. You will be joining an international innovative digital bank, the first in Italy to adopt a fully flexible smart working model, and you will be working in a stimulating environment where you can grow both as an individual and as a professional.


Our purpose \- empowering people to stay a step ahead in life and in business \- represents our belief in people’s potential. We don’t judge, coach or to tell people how to live their lives. We empower people and businesses to realize their own vision for a better future.


**Our Commitment**


Diversity is a fundamental element of our corporate culture, and we are fully committed to creating a safe and inclusive environment, based on mutual respect and the value of diversity, offering equal job opportunities to all qualified candidates.


**Job Application Safety Reminder** **️**


We’re seeing an increase in fraudulent job offers. To protect yourself, please follow these key guidelines when applying for roles at ING:

* Check the sender’s email carefully: legitimate communication will always come from: @ing.com and/or @myworkday.com

Cerchiamo professionisti con una forte passione per l’innovazione nel settore finanziario, una solida comprensione dell’ecosistema Digital Asset e la capacità di coniugare visione strategica, conoscenza normativa ed execution progettuale

* Spirito imprenditoriale, curiosità e interesse per i trend emergenti del settore finanziario e tecnologico.

Avrai l’opportunità di lavorare su alcuni dei temi più innovativi e strategici del mercato finanziario, collaborando con professionisti altamente qualificati e con i principali attori dell’ecosistema Digital Asset. title: Farmacista collaboratore/collaboratrice - Limbiate
description:
Unisciti al nostro team e contribuisci al benessere delle persone!
  
  

Chi siamo
  
  

Farma Acquisition Holding, parte del The Boots Group, è un Retailer Farmaceutico che gestisce oltre 90 Farmacie di proprietà presenti in più di 10 regioni italiane.
  
  

Le nostre radici affondano negli anni '70 con Alleanza Farmaceutica, storica realtà della Distribuzione all'ingrosso di farmaci. Da questa esperienza è nato il nostro percorso nella gestione diretta delle Farmacie, con l'obiettivo di offrire un servizio sempre più vicino alle persone e ai bisogni di salute delle comunità locali.
  
  

Nel 2018 Boots è arrivata in Italia, portando con sé una storia iniziata nel 1849 nel Regno Unito e un'esperienza riconosciuta a livello internazionale nel campo della salute, del benessere, dell'innovazione e della qualità del servizio.
  
  

In Boots crediamo che la Farmacia sia molto più di un luogo dove dispensare farmaci: è uno spazio di ascolto, prevenzione e consulenza, in cui ogni professionista può contribuire concretamente al benessere delle persone e fare la differenza ogni giorno.
  
  

Per la nostra Farmacia di Limbiate siamo alla ricerca di un/una Farmacista che desideri crescere in un ambiente dinamico, innovativo e orientato alla qualità del servizio.
  
  

Principali attività
  
  

La risorsa sarà inserita all’interno della Farmacia e contribuirà allo svolgimento delle attività professionali, operative e gestionali necessarie al corretto funzionamento del punto vendita.
  
  

Si occuperà della dispensazione di farmaci, parafarmaci e prodotti per la salute, della consulenza qualificata al cliente/paziente e della vendita assistita di dispositivi medici, integratori, prodotti dermocosmetici, articoli sanitari e prodotti per il benessere.
  
  

Parteciperà inoltre all’erogazione dei Servizi di Farmacia e della “Farmacia dei Servizi”, inclusi Servizi di screening, prevenzione, autoanalisi, prenotazioni, telemedicina e altre prestazioni attivabili secondo la normativa vigente.
  
  

La risorsa supporterà il Team nelle attività di gestione del magazzino, riordino, controllo delle scorte, verifica delle scadenze, corretta conservazione dei prodotti, utilizzo dei gestionali aziendali e gestione degli adempimenti amministrativi e documentali.
  
  

Collaborerà, inoltre, al rispetto della normativa di settore e delle procedure relative ai rapporti con ASL/ATS ed enti competenti, alla gestione dei farmaci stupefacenti, alla tracciabilità, alla farmacovigilanza e agli ulteriori adempimenti previsti per l’esercizio dell’attività farmaceutica.
  
  

Completano le attività la collaborazione con il Team di Farmacia, il rispetto delle procedure aziendali e il contributo al mantenimento di elevati standard di qualità del servizio, efficienza gestionale e continuità operativa.
  
  

Competenze e capacità richieste
  
  

Cerchiamo una persona con solida preparazione professionale, orientamento alla qualità del servizio e attenzione alla relazione con il cliente/paziente.
  
  

Sono richieste capacità di ascolto, comunicazione e consulenza, unite a precisione, affidabilità e senso di responsabilità nello svolgimento delle attività quotidiane.
  
  

Completano il profilo spirito di collaborazione, flessibilità organizzativa, attitudine al lavoro in team e interesse a contribuire all’evoluzione della farmacia come presidio sanitario di prossimità, nel rispetto degli standard professionali, aziendali e normativi.
  
  

Cosa offriamo
  
CCNL Farmacie Private
  
Contratto a tempo indeterminato
  
Full\-time
  
Formazione continua in ambito scientifico, consulenziale e gestionale
  
Sistema incentivante legato ai risultati
  
Percorsi di crescita professionale all'interno del Gruppo
  
Ambiente collaborativo e orientato al benessere delle persone
  
Work\-life balance garantito
  
  

Retribuzione e benefit
  
RAL indicativa tra € 32\.000 ed € 36\.000, già riproporzionata per il proprio orario di lavoro e commisurata all'esperienza e alle competenze
  
Buoni pasto
  
Sistema premiante annuale
  
Percorsi di sviluppo professionale e manageriale
  
  

Fai la differenza nella vita delle persone unendo la tua professionalità alla nostra missione!
  
Se sei un/una Farmacista appassionato/a, motivato/a e desideroso/a di lavorare in un contesto dinamico e innovativo, non esitare a candidarti. Farma Acquisition Holding \- Farmacie Boots ti aspetta per costruire insieme un futuro dedicato alla salute e al benessere

description:
Siamo alla ricerca di un Tecnico Impianti di Spillatura dinamico e orientato al cliente, che copra **le zone di Milano Ovest e Novara** con carisma e voglia di crescere per un'importante azienda privata del settore Horeca.

**Chi siamo:**

Siamo un'azienda leader nel settore Horeca, specializzata nella distribuzione di bevande e nella fornitura e gestione di impianti di spillatura che opera principalmente in tutta la Lombardia. La nostra missione è offrire ai nostri clienti il miglior servizio possibile e un'ampia gamma di prodotti e servizi per soddisfare le loro esigenze.

**Posizione e responsabilità:**

Come Tecnico Impianti di Spillatura, ti verrà assegnato un furgone aziendale equipaggiato con gli attrezzi necessari per le tue mansioni. Sarai responsabile dei lavaggi programmati, manutenzioni e riparazioni degli impianti di spillatura presso i nostri clienti. Lavorerai in stretta collaborazione con gli agenti di vendita e i clienti per garantire un servizio efficiente e risolvere qualsiasi problema possano avere gli impianti. Avrai una grande autonomia nel gestire i tuoi giri di lavoro, pur mantenendo un livello di professionalità e competenza in linea con gli standard aziendali.

**Requisiti:**

* Ottime capacità manuali e propensione per lavori tecnici
* Solida esperienza nella risoluzione di problemi (problem\-solving)
* Eccellente organizzazione e flessibilità nel lavoro
* Attenzione ai dettagli e precisione nel svolgimento delle mansioni
* Buone capacità di comunicazione e cura nel rapporto con i clienti
* Esperienza pregressa in ruoli simili o in lavori di montaggio attrezzature è un plus
* Patente B in corso di validità
* Residenza in Milano ovest, Novara o zone limitrofe

**Cosa offriamo:**

* Contratto di lavoro a tempo determinato per 3 mesi con l'obiettivo di una successiva assunzione a tempo indeterminato
* Formazione continua e affiancamento durante il periodo di inserimento
* Pacchetto retributivo competitivo
* Ambiente di lavoro dinamico e possibilità di crescita professionale

Se sei una persona che unisce passione per il mondo delle bevande e degli impianti di spillatura a un forte senso del dovere e professionalità, candidati e inviaci il tuo curriculum vitae!

**Nota:** Questa è un'opportunità di lavoro aperta a tutti i candidati qualificati, indipendentemente dal genere, età, origine etnica, orientamento sessuale o eventuali disabilità. I candidati con esigenze speciali possono richiedere accomodamenti durante il processo di selezione.

description:

TECNICO SERVICE – MILANO E PROVINCIA

* Conoscenze idrauliche di base per il collegamento delle tubazioni di dosaggio e l'inserimento dei detergenti nelle lavatrici e nelle lavastoviglie professionali.
* Buona manualità tecnica e utilizzo degli utensili da lavoro.
* Attitudine alla risoluzione dei problemi.
* Buone capacità relazionali e orientamento al cliente.

Costituisce titolo preferenziale l'esperienza come elettricista, idraulico, manutentore, installatore o tecnico di assistenza.

* Ristorazione (bar, ristoranti, hotel, mense e comunità).

* Inserimento in un'azienda solida e in crescita.
* Opportunità di crescita professionale all'interno del reparto tecnico.

Cerchiamo una persona affidabile, autonoma e orientata al servizio, capace di rappresentare PerPulire presso il cliente e contribuire alla qualità delle soluzioni offerte dall'azienda.

title: BDR Outbound
description:
**Chi siamo**  

Stiamo ridisegnando il sistema operativo finanziario per PMI e commercialisti.  

Oggi aziende e studi lavorano con strumenti frammentati e inefficienti. Noi siamo qui per cambiarlo: uniamo fatturazione, pagamenti, tesoreria e contabilità in un’unica piattaforma moderna, restituendo tempo e creando valore reale.  

Siamo ambiziosi, pragmatici ed efficienti. Costruiamo velocemente e puntiamo sempre al massimo.  

Siamo una realtà in forte crescita, supportata da alcuni dei migliori investitori internazionali — tra cui Keen Venture Partners (Fiscozen), Founders (Pleo), Exor Ventures (Qonto, Alan), Notion Capital e Creandum (Klarna, Spotify).

 **Questo è solo l’inizio.**

  

Se vuoi costruire qualcosa che può cambiare il modo in cui lavora il 90% delle aziende in Italia, questo è il posto giusto.

**Il ruolo**


Stiamo cercando un/una **Business Development Representative (BDR)** da inserire nel nostro team **outbound**.


Sarai il primo punto di contatto tra Sibill e le PMI. Il tuo lavoro è concentrato interamente nella prima parte del funnel di vendita: portare agli Account Executive solo lead qualificati e pronti a valutare il prodotto.


Per anni Sibill è stato il software di riferimento per la micro e piccola impresa italiana (fino a 10 milioni di fatturato). Con i recenti sviluppi, **puntiamo ora anche a medie aziende** (10\-100 milioni di fatturato), che richiedono azioni proattive poiché difficilmente raggiungibili tramite canali Inbound.

**Cosa farai**

* **Cold prospecting:** gestirai lead outbound e chiamate a freddo alle aziende, identificando e contattando quelle in target via telefono ed email
* **Qualifica dei lead:** valutare il fit tra le esigenze del prospect e Sibill, filtrando i non rilevanti e coltivando chi non è ancora pronto
* **Prenotazione delle demo:** quando il lead è qualificato, prenotare la demo con l’Account Executive di riferimento
* **Gestione della pipeline:** lavorare la propria pipeline e tenerla sempre aggiornata su HubSpot

**Sei la persona giusta se**


Prima di continuare a leggere, se il tuo profilo non corrisponde al 100% a quello descritto, ma riconosci in queste attività le tue capacità e quello che stai cercando, prosegui lo stesso!

* Ti riconosci nei valori di Sibill: **ambizione, pragmatismo, efficienza, integrità**
* Parli fluentemente italiano e ti piace approcciarti ai decision maker delle aziende
* Ti trovi bene in contesti dinamici e veloci e ti motiva superare i tuoi obiettivi
* Sei a tuo agio con volumi elevati di attività e task ripetitivi
* Sei un **problem solver**, non solo un venditore aggressivo
* Hai una mentalità imprenditoriale: individui problemi e proponi soluzioni
* Sei resiliente: un “no” al telefono ti motiva a fare la prossima chiamata


Siamo aperti a profili con **0–2 anni di esperienza** **in sales** (in SaaS/Tech è un plus, ma per noi contano prima di tutto mindset e potenziale)

**Cosa offriamo**

* **40K OTE (base \+ variabile)**
* Variabile **senza tetto massimo**, con acceleratori per chi supera gli obiettivi
* Ticket restaurant (8€/giorno)
* Lavoro ibrido (basato a Milano)
* Budget welfare (400€)


In Sibill si lavora tanto, ma con impatto reale.


E sì — le persone qui tendono ad essere felici. Non è scontato.

**Cultura aziendale**

* Un team smart, motivato e collaborativo
* Tanta autonomia, visibilità e crescita personale rapida
* Un prodotto che fa davvero la differenza

**Processo di selezione**

* Colloquio con Lucia, del People Team (30')
* Colloquio tecnico con Andrea, Head of Sales e Francesco, responsabile clienti (45’)
* Colloquio con Mattia, CEO (30’)

### ***By applying, you consent to Sibill’s processing of your personal data for recruitment and hiring purposes, in accordance with our Privacy Policy available at:*** ***https://sibill.com/trattamento\-dei\-dati/***

title: mRNA QC Lab Coordinator
description:
**Work Schedule**


First Shift (Days)**Environmental Conditions**


Laboratory Setting**Job Description**


As part of the Thermo Fisher Scientific team, you’ll discover meaningful work that makes a positive impact on a global scale. Join our colleagues in bringing our Mission to life every single day to enable our customers to make the world healthier, cleaner and safer. We provide our global teams with the resources needed to achieve individual career goals while helping to take science a step beyond by developing solutions for some of the world’s toughest challenges, like protecting the environment, making sure our food is safe or helping find cures for cancer.  

  

DESCRIPTION:


Joining the mRNA QC Lab, you will be included in a dynamic environment and you will gain and in\-depth experience of a GMP Quality control lab passionate about new projects and technology transfers.


In this role, you will be responsible for overseeing the day\-to\-day operations of the Quality Control laboratory, ensuring compliance with cGMP requirements and company quality standards. You will coordinate laboratory activities and ensure the timely review and approval of laboratory documentation.


A key aspect of the role will be the management of QC quality systems, including the handling of laboratory events as analytical not conformities, laboratory deviations, OOS investigations, CAPAs, change controls, and laboratory documentation. You will be responsible for maintaining and updating SOPs, analytical methods, protocols, reports, and other GMP\-controlled documents, ensuring data integrity and regulatory compliance.


You will support the qualification, calibration, and maintenance of laboratory instruments, oversee laboratory procedures, and ensure adherence to established quality and safety standards. In addition, you will lead and mentor QC laboratory personnel, fostering a culture of quality, continuous improvement, and operational excellence.


The role requires close collaboration with cross\-functional teams to support inspections, audits, process improvements, and overall laboratory compliance.

  

REQUIREMENTS:  

* Minimum 4 years of experience in quality control within a regulated environment (pharmaceutical/medical device preferred)
* Preferred Fields of Study: Chemistry, Biology, or related scientific field
* Demonstrated proficiency with analytical testing equipment and techniques (HPLC, GC, spectrophotometry)
* Strong understanding of cGMP requirements and quality systems
* Experience with quality documentation and data review
* Proven ability to lead and mentor others while maintaining quality standards
* Excellent attention to detail and organizational skills
* Strong verbal and written communication abilities
* Proficiency with standard office software and LIMS systems
* Ability to work in cleanroom environments and follow gowning procedures
* Physical ability to stand for extended periods, lift up to 25 lbs occasionally
* Flexibility to work various shifts as needed
* Problem\-solving skills and ability to troubleshoot technical issues
* Experience writing and reviewing SOPs and technical documentation

All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, creed, religion, color, national or ethnic origin, citizenship, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity and expression, genetic information, veteran status, age or disability status.

We will ensure that individuals with disabilities are provided reasonable accommodation to participate in the job application or interview process, to perform essential job functions, and to receive other benefits and privileges of employment. Please contact us to request accommodation.

***The chance to build a better future is right in front of you***

  

***Do Work That Matters \- Il tuo ruolo e le tue responsabilità***


**KPMG Fides Servizi di Amministrazione** offre servizi professionali nei processi amministrativi, contabili e fiscali. Svolge un ruolo chiave nella ridefinizione dei modelli di reporting e nell’armonizzazione dei processi di contabilità gestionale.



Con oltre 300 professionisti distribuiti in sei sedi, KPMG Fides continua a crescere. In qualità di società italiana del network KPMG specializzata nei servizi amministrativi, contabili e fiscali, KPMG Accounting supporta importanti aziende italiane e internazionali nelle aree di amministrazione, finanza e controllo. Ha un ruolo centrale nell’individuare opportunità, ridefinire i modelli di reporting e armonizzare i processi gestionali.  

In KPMG investiamo nei giovani per fornire loro competenze solide e trasformarli in professionisti affidabili e di fiducia. Entrando a far parte di uno dei team Accounting, lavorerai a stretto contatto con aziende leader, supportandole con un approccio integrato alla compliance amministrativa, traducendo i requisiti normativi, regolamentari e procedurali in processi contabili, fiscali e legali.



Siamo alla ricerca di **nuove risorse** per la sede di **Milano** da inserire in attività amministrative e contabili per i nostri clienti. Le persone selezionate saranno coinvolte nelle seguenti attività:


* Gestione delle pratiche richieste dalle **Camere di Commercio** (es. rinnovo cariche societarie e amministrative, deposito bilanci, ecc.);
* Invii telematici all’**Agenzia delle Entrate**;
* Invii telematici all’**Agenzia delle Dogane**;
* Pratiche per il rilascio di **firme digitali** e caselle **PEC.**

  


***Come As*** ***You Are \- Le tue competenze e caratteristiche***



Questa opportunità è perfetta per te se hai:


* **Diploma** di scuola superiore in **materie economiche**;
* Buona conoscenza del pacchetto **Microsoft Office** (in particolare Excel, PowerPoint, ecc.);
* Conoscenza base della **lingua inglese**;
* Ottime **capacità relazionali** e di **lavoro in team**, approccio flessibile e dinamico.

  


***Your Future With Us \- Cosa troverai in KPMG***


* Un ambiente di lavoro **inclusivo** ed **equo** che valorizza la diversità;
* Un **contesto sfidante e dinamico** che stimola la creatività e il lavoro di squadra;
* Modalità di lavoro ibride per favorire un buon **equilibrio tra vita privata e professionale**;
* Programmi avanzati di **formazione e sviluppo** per restare sempre aggiornati;
* Mentalità **internazionale** e progetti **innovativi**;
* Iniziative dedicate al **benessere mentale e fisico**.

  


***Together for Better – I nostri valori e il nostro impegno***



Leadership, lavoro di squadra, rispetto per ogni individuo, apprendimento continuo, trasparenza, impegno verso la comunità e integrità. Questi sono i **valori di KPMG** che creano un ambiente dove le idee e le conoscenze vengono condivise, permettendo ai nostri professionisti di esprimere tutto il loro potenziale.



Grazie all’impegno nel favorire un **ambiente di lavoro inclusivo**, il nostro Network risulta conforme agli standard dei requisiti **ISO 30415**, sul Sistema di Gestione per la Diversità e l’Inclusione, e **UNI PdR 125**, relativa alla parità di genere.  

Nel nostro **Impact Plan** – Our Impact Plan (kpmg.com) – trovi riassunte tutte le azioni concrete che stiamo intraprendendo in ambito ambientale, sociale e di governance (ESG).


### **Unisciti a noi!**

  


*I tuoi dati saranno trattati nel pieno rispetto delle disposizioni del Regolamento (UE) n. 679/2016 (General Data Protection Regulation \- "GDPR") e successive modifiche. Per ulteriori informazioni, consultare l'informativa sulla privacy di KPMG.*  

*KPMG Fides servizi di Amministrazione S.p.**A. garantisce le pari opportunità*

  

**e\-Data services Internship \| Milano**

  

***The chance to build a better future is right in front of you***

  

***Do Work That Matters \- Your role and responsibilities***


**KPMG Fides Servizi di Amministrazione** provides professional services for administrative, accounting and tax processes. It plays a key role in redesigning reporting models and harmonising management accounting processes.



KPMG Fides has over 300 professionals across six locations and continues to grow. As the Italian company of the KPMG network providing professional services for administrative, accounting and tax processes, KPMG Accounting supports leading Italian and international companies with administration, finance and control. It plays a key role in identifying potential opportunities, redesigning reporting models and harmonising management accountng processes. At KPMG, we aim to invest in young people to equip them with the solid skills they need to become trusted, reliable professionals. By joining one of KPMG’s Accounting teams, you will work closely with leading companies, assisting them with an integrated compliance approach to administrative activities to translate the various legislative, regulatory and procedural requirements into accounting, tax and legal processes.



We are recruiting **staff members** for our **Milan office** to carry out administrative/accounting activities for our clients. Successful candidates will be involved in the following activities:


* Management of procedures related to the requirements set by the **Chambers of Commerce** (e.g., renewal of corporate and administrative positions, financial statement filing, etc.).
* Electronic submissions to the **Italian Revenue Agency**;
* Electronic submissions to the **Customs Agency**;
* Procedures related to the issuance of **digital signatures** and **certified email accounts**.
  


The ideal candidate must have:


* High school **diploma** in **business subjects**;
* Good knowledge of **Microsoft Office** (particularly Excel, PowerPoint, etc.);
* Basic knowledge of **English**;
* Excellent **interpersonal** and **team working skills** and a flexible and dynamic approach.

  

  

***Your Future With Us \- What you’ll find at KPMG***


* An **inclusive** and **equitable** work environment that respects, encourages and values diversity.
* A **challenging and dynamic environment** that encourages creativity and teamwork.
* Hybrid work arrangements to promote a **healthy work\-life balance.**
* **Advanced training** and development programmes to stay current.
* **International** mindset and **innovative** projects.
* Initiatives focused on mental and physical **well\-being.**

  

  

***Together for Better – Our values and commitment***



Leadership, teamwork, respect every individual, continuous learning, transparency, commitment to the community and integrity. These are the **KPMG values** that create an environment that encourages the sharing of ideas and knowledge, so our professionals can achieve their full potential.



As a result of our commitment to fostering an **inclusive work** environment, our Network complies with the standards of the **ISO 30415** requirements, on the Diversity and Inclusion Management System, and **UNI PdR 125**, relating to gender equality.  

Within our **Impact Plan** \- Our Impact Plan (kpmg.com) \- you will find summarised all the concrete actions we are taking on environmental, social and governance (ESG) issues.


**Join us!**

*Your data will be processed in full compliance with the provisions of Regulation (EU) no. 679/2016 (General Data Protection Regulation \- “GDPR”), as amended. Please see KPMG’s privacy policy for further information.*

  


*KPMG Fides servizi di Amministrazione S.p.A. is an equal opportunity employer.*

title: Project Financial Controller (Consulting Role)
description:
* **Drive insight. Shape decisions. Partner with clients.**


At ReachCentrum, part of ERM — a global leader in sustainability consulting — we are looking for a **Project Financial Consultant** to join our finance consulting team.


This is not a traditional reporting role. It is a **consulting\-facing position** where you will act as a **key business partner**, helping project managers and clients understand complex financial situations, identify risks and opportunities, and support informed decision\-making.


You will work at the crossroads of **finance, client advisory, and regulatory projects**, contributing directly to the success of international REACH Consortia.

* **Why this role stands out**
* Act as a **trusted advisor**, not just a financial reporter
* Work closely with **project managers and clients**, influencing decisions
* Gain exposure to **complex, high\-value, international projects**
* Play an active role in **improving tools, processes, and ways of working**
* Develop a strong combination of **financial expertise and consulting skills**

* **Your impact**


In this role, you will move beyond numbers to deliver **clear, actionable financial insight**.


You will:

* Lead the preparation of **high\-quality financial reporting**, ensuring accuracy and relevance for both internal and external stakeholders
* Analyse project performance and **translate financial data into meaningful insights and recommendations**
* Identify and explain variances, and **work alongside project managers to drive corrective actions**
* Support decision\-making by providing **forward\-looking views on budgets, risks, and financial performance**
* Act as a **bridge between finance and non\-finance stakeholders**, making complex topics clear and accessible
* Contribute to **client discussions**, bringing financial clarity and strengthening trust

* **Core responsibilities**
* Monitor assigned projects on a monthly basis, ensuring:
	+ Accurate recording of financial transactions
	+ Correct allocation of internal time
	+ Adequate budget coverage
* Ensure data integrity within reporting systems and support the transition to **enhanced digital tools**
* Review and validate financial outputs before external communication
* Translate the financial history and current position of each consortium into **clear, structured reporting**, supporting transparency and governance
* Contribute to the **continuous improvement of financial processes and controls**

* **What we are looking for**


We are looking for a **consultative mindset combined with strong financial foundations**:

* Experience in **project controlling, financial analysis, or business analysis**
* Ability to **interpret data and communicate insights clearly to non\-finance audiences**
* Strong stakeholder management skills, with confidence working across teams and geographies
* Ability to manage competing priorities in a fast\-paced, matrix environment
* Proactive, curious, and solution\-oriented
* Strong interest in **process improvement and value creation**
* Advanced Excel skills (essential)
* Fluent in English; additional languages are a plus

* **What makes this role unique**
* You will work on **confidential and highly specialised consortia projects**, each with its own financial logic
* You will combine **technical expertise with advisory impact**
* You will operate in a setting where your work directly supports **client outcomes and regulatory compliance**
* No two projects are the same — you will continuously **learn, adapt, and grow as a consultant**

* **Ready to grow as a finance consultant?**


If you are looking to move into a role where you can **combine finance, consulting, and client interaction**, while developing a strong business partnering skillset in an international environment, we would love to hear from you.


The recommended recruiting range for this role is 28\.000 \- 32\.000\.


\#LI\-AP2


\#LI\-Hybrid


⠀


ERM is committed to creating an inclusive workplace where everyone feels valued, respected, and empowered to thrive, it’s an essential part of what makes ERM a great place to build a career and helps us create better solutions for our clients.


We welcome talent from all backgrounds and provide equal opportunities for every candidate. If you have a disability, are neurodivergent, or need accommodations during the selection process, we’re here to support you. Our commitment doesn’t stop at hiring. Once you join us, we’ll ensure you have the tools, support, and adjustments needed to succeed and feel a true sense of belonging. Learn more about our Diversity, Inclusion \& Belonging (DIB) efforts by visiting our website or exploring our 2025 Sustainability Report..

title: Senior Account Executive, Enterprise
description:
### **About Behavox**



Behavox is a cloud\-native AI company providing an integrated controls platform for global banks, asset managers, hedge funds, private equity firms, insurance businesses, and commodity firms. The platform unifies communications and trade surveillance, compliant archiving, policy management as well as front\-office analytics on a single, AI\-native technology stack, delivered as a globally scalable SaaS\-based cloud service.



At Behavox, our engineering culture is built around speed, experimentation, and technical excellence, following agile principles and rapid iteration. We constantly test and adopt the latest cloud technologies and AI tooling, optimising for fast feedback loops and execution. We look for people who can move fast, challenge conventional wisdom, and who want to work at the frontier of modern AI, SaaS platforms, and distributed systems.



Behavox is a high\-performance organisation with a strong bias toward delivery, ownership, and responsibility. We commit, and we execute. We are building systems that are complex, mission\-critical, and global in scale; systems that many consider too large or too difficult. To do that, we seek the smartest, most technically capable engineers and technologists who take end\-to\-end responsibility and want to win by building what others cannot.



Founded in 2014 and backed by SoftBank Vision Fund, Behavox is headquartered in London, with offices worldwide, including New York City, Montreal, Seattle, Singapore, and Tokyo.


### **About the Role**



The Senior Enterprise Account Executive is responsible for driving revenue growth within a named portfolio of strategic enterprise accounts aligned to one of Behavox's core verticals: Banking and Capital Markets, Asset and Wealth Management, Private Equity, or Commodities. The role focuses on new business acquisition and expansion within highly complex customer environments, managing larger deal sizes involving broader buying groups, multiple business units, and higher organizational complexity than BCL3 roles, while maintaining ownership of selective renewals within their account set.



This role owns the full commercial sales lifecycle for strategic accounts, including AE\-led outbound prospecting, opportunity shaping, value articulation to both above\-the\-line business stakeholders and below\-the\-line functional buyers, commercial negotiation, and contract execution for the Behavox Controls Platform. The Senior Account Executive is accountable for shaping and advancing the commercial value case by aligning customer strategic objectives, economic outcomes, and executive priorities to the buying decision, and for maintaining durable executive relationships across complex stakeholder environments. The role operates with greater autonomy over deal strategy, stakeholder navigation, and commercial sequencing while executing within established go\-to\-market strategy and commercial frameworks. Disciplined pipeline management, forecasting accuracy, and sales hygiene in HubSpot are required to support predictability across a strategic book of business. Following initial contract signature, the role retains commercial ownership of the account and partners with Customer Success to drive value\-led expansion and renewals.


### **What You'll Bring**


* **Executive enterprise buying dynamics** – Deep knowledge of how senior executives in large, regulated financial institutions evaluate strategic investments across multiple business units and stakeholder groups.


* **Advanced vertical business and regulatory context** – Strong understanding of the business models, regulatory pressures, and control challenges shaping strategic priorities within the assigned industry vertical.


* **Behavox Controls Platform strategic value** – Knowledge of how the platform supports enterprise\-wide risk, compliance, and operational objectives, and how that value is positioned to executive and business unit leaders.


* **Complex multi\-stakeholder deal economics** – Knowledge of high\-value enterprise sales involving multiple buyers, budget owners, and approval paths across business units.


* **Strategic account lifecycle management** – Understanding of how executive alignment, cross\-business adoption, and commercial stewardship support sustained growth within strategic accounts.


### **What You'll Do**


* **Strategic outbound prospecting and pipeline ownership** – Owns outbound pipeline generation within a strategic named account portfolio, with heavy reliance on direct AE\-led prospecting and partnership with SDR and Marketing to engage senior executive and functional stakeholders across business units.


* **Complex enterprise deal leadership** – Owns end\-to\-end commercial execution for large, complex opportunities involving multiple buying groups, setting deal strategy, stakeholder engagement plans, and negotiation approach through close.


* **Executive\-level value\-based selling** – Owns the articulation and progression of a strategic value case for the Behavox Controls Platform by linking enterprise objectives, economic impact, and executive priorities to the buying decision.


* **Advanced commercial negotiation, deal governance, and CRM hygiene** – Leads complex pricing and commercial negotiations, structures non\-standard deal terms within approval frameworks, and maintains high\-fidelity pipeline, activity, and forecast hygiene in HubSpot.


* **Strategic post\-signature account ownership** – Retains commercial ownership after close, maintaining executive relationships and working with Customer Success to identify, scope, and close expansion opportunities across business units.


### **What We Offer**


* The opportunity to work on a global, mission\-critical AI platform alongside the best engineers and technologists across multiple geographies.
* A role with real ownership and impact, building complex systems at scale in an environment that values speed, experimentation, and technical excellence.
* A highly attractive benefits package, including competitive cash compensation, an equity award aligned with long\-term value creation, and comprehensive health insurance for employees and their families.
* A generous time\-off policy of 30 days annually, plus public holidays and sick leave, recognizing the importance of sustained high performance.

### **About Our Process**

  


We take Talent very seriously and we are building a community of extraordinary individuals working together in very high performing teams. We also know that the best Talent always has options so we believe that the process has to be a two way assessment \- the company AND the candidate assessing the business needs alignment, the career next step alignment, and the cultural alignment.  

  

During the process we will begin by exploring the core factors regarding salary and location along with core experience and skills and values alignment. We will then deep dive explore the critical technical competencies we have identified for the role, and then we will deep dive in behavioral competencies.  

  

The most aligned candidate will then be asked to do a practical work task simulation activity so we can make sure that you will enjoy the kind of work the role requires, and this task will typically be presented and discussed with a group of colleagues and managers. Finally we will ask you to meet with a number of our senior leaders to make sure that you are making the most informed call possible.


### **Please note that:**


* We want to get to know you and have a genuine conversation, so the use of AI tools or assistance during live interviews is strictly prohibited and will result in immediate disqualification from the process
* Interviews may be recorded for internal review purposes to ensure fairness and enable collaborative hiring discussions within the team.

title: OT Network Engineer
description:
**OT Network Engineer**

 **Role Summary**

  



We are seeking an OT Network Engineer to support the design, implementation, and operation of secure, resilient network infrastructure for hyperscale data centre environments in Siziano, Milan. The role supports Operational Technology systems including Building Management Systems (BMS), Electrical Power Monitoring Systems (EPMS), and other critical site infrastructure.



Working with internal technology, engineering, operations, and vendor teams, you will help maintain network availability, performance, and security while supporting troubleshooting, documentation, and continuous improvement. This is a hands\-on, site\-based role requiring regular presence across local data centre sites in the Siziano/Milan area.

 **Key Responsibilities**

  


* Design, implement, maintain, and optimise network infrastructure for OT environments across critical data centre sites.
* Install, configure, and support routers, switches, firewalls, and related network devices to maintain performance, resilience, and service continuity.
* Monitor network performance, investigate complex incidents, work with internal teams and vendors, and help drive root cause resolution and continuous improvement.
* Support monitoring, alerting, backup, testing, validation, and documentation activities across OT network systems.
* Apply security, operational, and regulatory best practices in a high\-availability environment.
* Participate in out\-of\-hours or emergency support when required to maintain service continuity.

  


**What You’ll Bring**

  


* Experience as a Network Engineer in an enterprise, critical infrastructure, or data centre environment.
* Strong hands\-on experience with Cisco networking technologies, Fortinet security solutions, and network infrastructure including LAN/WAN, firewalls, switches, routers, wireless networking, VPN, OSPF, VLANs, and TCP/IP.
* Strong understanding of network security principles, troubleshooting, and operational support in high\-availability environments.
* Experience supporting or working with OT systems such as BMS, EPMS, SCADA, PLCs, and HMIs is desirable.
* Knowledge of infrastructure cabling, monitoring, management, documentation, and reporting tools, with scripting or automation tools including Bash or Python an advantage.
* Awareness of standards and compliance requirements such as ISO, SOC 2, and PCI\-DSS is beneficial.
* Strong analytical, problem\-solving, collaboration, and communication skills in Italian and English, with commitment to accurate technical documentation and disciplined operational processes.
* A degree in Computer Science, Information Systems, Network Engineering, or a related discipline is preferred, although equivalent practical experience will also be considered.

  


**Cosa offriamo /** **What we Offer**

  


* Fascia Retributiva (RAL): 45\.000 € \- 57\.000 € \+ premio di risultato.
* Contratto CCNL Commercio (Terziario, Distribuzione e Servizi).
* Buoni pasto e piano welfare aziendale.
* Assistenza sanitaria e accesso al fondo pensione complementare, secondo quanto previsto dal CCNL
* Contribuirai allo sviluppo e alla gestione di infrastrutture digitali mission\-critical, operando in alcuni degli ambienti data centre più avanzati d'Europa.
* Cresci con STACK, acquisendo esperienza su progetti di grande scala e cogliendo concrete opportunità di crescita professionale all'interno di una piattaforma europea in forte espansione.

  



La fascia retributiva indicata rappresenta il range previsto per il ruolo. La retribuzione sarà determinata in modo equo e trasparente all'interno di tale fascia, sulla base dell'esperienza professionale, delle competenze e delle qualifiche del candidato.

 **Location requirement:**

  

  

Due to the hybrid nature of this role, candidates should be based close to Milan or have confirmed plans to relocate to the area. Please note that we cannot consider applicants based outside Italy for this opportunity.

 **About STACK Infrastructure**

  



STACK is a proven, trusted partner for the world’s most innovative companies, designing, developing, and operating sustainable global digital infrastructure. Backed by an unmatched record of reliable delivery and development expertise, STACK brings speed, scale, certainty, and responsibility to the demands of a rapidly evolving digital infrastructure landscape.

  



For more information about STACK, please visit: www.stackinfra.com

title: Senior Technical Analyst
description:
**THE ROLE**



The Senior Technical Analyst plays a critical role in safeguarding and optimizing the technical performance of WiseEnergy's global solar PV portfolio. This position is responsible for ensuring high levels of asset availability and strong performance ratios across all sites, while proactively identifying and resolving technical issues that may impact operations. Acting as a key technical reference, the role bridges operational performance with strategic objectives.

  

In close collaboration with O\&M contractors and internal stakeholders, the Senior Technical Analyst oversees technical operations, ensures compliance with contractual and regulatory requirements, and serves as the primary technical interface with clients. Through effective coordination of site activities, reporting, and technical documentation, this role ensures the highest standards of operational excellence across the portfolio.

  

Beyond day\-to\-day operations, the role contributes to continuous improvement and long\-term business success. By mentoring junior analysts, driving process optimization, and strengthening technical capabilities within the team, the Senior Technical Analyst directly supports WiseEnergy's mission to maximize asset value and deliver reliable, sustainable energy solutions across the global renewable energy market.

  


**KEY RESPONSIBILITIES**


* Supervise and analyse daily technical and operational performance of solar PV plants, identifying trends, anomalies, and opportunities for improvement.
* Detect, investigate, resolve, and prevent incidents to optimise plant availability and performance ratios.
* Support portfolio supervision and contribute to technical analysis and strategic decision\-making alongside senior stakeholders.
* Manage O\&M contractor relationships, ensuring compliance with contractual obligations and high service delivery standards.
* Act as the main technical interface with clients, providing expert insights and maintaining strong stakeholder relationships.
* Coordinate O\&M handovers, site visits, punch lists, and technical documentation to ensure quality and timely execution.
* Prepare and deliver high\-quality technical performance reports, ensuring accuracy, clarity, and actionable insights.
* Support compliance with Distribution Network Operators (DNOs), insurers, and relevant regulatory authorities.
* Identify and implement continuous improvement initiatives to enhance operational efficiency and overall asset performance.
* Lead team activities, including workload planning, team meetings, and fostering a collaborative and high\-performing environment.
* Mentor, train, and support junior analysts, promoting knowledge sharing, best practices, and professional development.

  


**SKILLS \& COMPETENCIES**



To be successful in this role, you will demonstrate:


* **Excellent communication and presentation skills (in English and Spanish/Portuguese advantageous) \-** you must be able to organize your thoughts in a way that others find clear and compelling. You will be expected to put together well\-written, grammatically correct emails, presentations and other communications. When communicating verbally – whether over the phone, on video calls, in person or in meetings – you will need to be articulate and engaging.
* **Time management \& prioritization skills** \- the ability to effectively manage yourself and your workload is critical.
* **Fast Learner –** Our US portfolio spans multiple states (New York, Virginia and North Carolina) with differing PPAs and regulatory requirements in each. Being able to quickly digest, learn and adapt to these differing challenges is key
* **Flexibility** \- being an effective team player means being flexible in your approach and open to getting involved with new things, even if they are not spelt out in your job description.
* Analytical and problem\-solving mindset with attention to detail, capable of interpreting complex contracts, regulations, and financial data.
* Strong negotiation and influencing skills to manage contracts, disputes, and external counterparties.
* Commercial acumen with the ability to assess risks, identify opportunities, and optimize asset performance.
* Project management skills, with experience coordinating cross\-functional initiatives and ensuring timely delivery.
* **Delivery focus** – it may sound obvious, but the ability to proactively churn through work at pace and deliver quality outputs really matters.
* **IT literacy** \- you need to be comfortable with IT systems and working with data, particularly Excel.
* **Passion for our mission** 'to generate a more sustainable future by leading the transition to clean energy.
* **Our values:** be a leader, build trust, be responsible, be innovative and 'bring your alpha'.

  


**EXPERIENCE \& QUALIFICATIONS**


* Master's degree in Engineering or a relevant science discipline.
* Minimum of 6 years' experience in the solar PV sector, ideally within a developer, asset management company, or engineering consultancy.
* Solid background in managing PV portfolios, performance analysis, and root cause identification of site issues.
* Proven experience handling O\&M handovers and claims with manufacturers (modules, inverters, etc.).
* Demonstrated ability to lead high\-level meetings with clients and stakeholders. Experience working in international environments is considered an advantage.
* Proficiency in English (mandatory). Knowledge of Spanish, Portuguese, or Italian is advantageous.
* Proficiency in Microsoft Office (Excel, Word, PowerPoint). Experience using PVsyst.
* Availability to travel internationally

  


**WHAT WE OFFER**


* A busy role in a supportive team, with plenty of opportunities to learn.
* International scope – we operate in over 8 countries.
* Hybrid working – we will need you in the central Madrid/Seville at least twice a week, but you will normally be able to work remotely for the remainder of the week. If the position is in Milan you will have two days of remote working.
* 38 days' holiday per year (including local bank holidays and 3 of which are taken during the festive shutdown in December).
* Sanitas Healthcare for you and qualifying dependents.
* Annual discretionary bonus.

  


**HOW TO APPLY**



If you are interested in this opportunity, please follow the link to apply. If you have been shortlisted for the next stage, we will be in contact within 14 days.


*By selecting "Apply" or sending us your CV, you indicate you have read and acknowledged NextEnergy Group's Candidate Privacy Notice.*

  


**DIVERSITY AND INCLUSION**



Our approach to diversity and inclusion is a natural extension of our values. Our entrepreneurial culture inspires us to try new things, be open to different viewpoints and be bold. Our Group is committed to cultivating and preserving a culture of connectedness that values difference and gives space for individual expression. The collective sum of our individual differences, life experiences, knowledge, innovation, self\-expression, and talent and hard work form the bedrock of who we are and who we aspire to be.



We are committed to equal employment and advancement opportunity irrespective of race, color, ancestry, social background, religion, gender, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability and gender identity.

title: Corporate Events Employee
description:
**Responsibilities**
--------------------

Ensure the effective end\-to\-end management of domestic and international corporate actions within an outsourcing model, delivering high standards of accuracy, efficiency, and regulatory compliance.


The role is responsible for overseeing the full lifecycle of corporate events—from information gathering and client communication to processing and execution—while guaranteeing seamless integration within internal systems and client accounts.


Act as a point of contact for clients, providing timely support, resolving inquiries and issues, and contributing to a high\-quality service experience.


**Tasks and responsibilities:**

* Collect and analyze information from custodians, performing an in\-depth assessment of each corporate action event
* Prepare clear and comprehensive communications for clients, ensuring accuracy and completeness of information
* Process corporate action events within internal IT systems to effectively notify beneficial holders of relevant details
* Manage event execution within client accounts, ensuring timely and accurate processing
* Handle client inquiries and complaints, providing prompt responses and effective solutions to ensure high service quality
**Profile required**
--------------------

**Studies \& experience:**

* Bachelor’s degree in economics or related fields
* Background in Securities Services, with a good understanding of industry standards and operational frameworks

**Language skills:**

* Excellent command of written and spoken Italian (C2 level), with the ability to communicate fluently and accurately in complex professional contexts
* Upper\-intermediate English (B2 level)

**Technical, operational \& Soft skills:**

* Team Spirit
* Collective Mindset
* Risk and fraud awareness
* Empowerment and Accountability
* Result orientation

**Salary range:** 35\.5k € \- 37\.5k € / Year


**Why join us**
---------------

SGSS has been present in Italy since September 2006 through a dedicated **Italian Bank, SGSS S.p.A** ., one of the main players in the Securities Services' industry that covers all SGSS businesses for its two segments of clients: Financial Institutions \& Brokers and Asset Managers \& Insurance. Thanks to over 500 employees based in Milan and Turin, SGSS S.p.A. ensures a daily support to over 300 clients. Our clients are institutional investors (insurance companies and pension funds), asset managers, financial intermediaries (brokers, investments companies).


In a highly competitive and fragmented financial market, our ambition is to be the reference partner recognized for its service quality and competitiveness, its agile solutions and international network coverage. We are much more than a partnership: a genuine team. We build long\-lasting, collaborative relationships with our clients to help them go further in their development. In today's constantly evolving and complex world, we strive to provide our clients with increasingly efficient and reliable Securities Services on a daily basis to ensure they get ahead.


**Business insight**
--------------------

At Société Générale, we are convinced that people are drivers of change, and that the world of tomorrow will be shaped by all their initiatives, from the smallest to the most ambitious.


Whether you’re joining us for a period of months, years or your entire career, together we can have a positive impact on the future. Creating, daring, innovating and taking action are part of our DNA.


If you too want to be directly involved, grow in a stimulating and caring environment, feel useful on a daily basis and develop or strengthen your expertise, you will feel right at home with us!


Still hesitating?


You should know that our employees can dedicate several days per year to solidarity actions during their working hours, including sponsoring people struggling with their orientation or professional integration, participating in the financial education of young apprentices, and sharing their skills with charities. There are many ways to get involved.


**Diversity and Inclusion**
---------------------------

We are an **equal opportunities employer** and we are proud to make diversity a strength for our company. Societe Generale is committed to recognizing and **promoting all talents** , regardless of their beliefs, age, disability, parental status, ethnic origin, nationality, gender identity, sexual orientation, membership of a political, religious, trade union or minority organisation, or any other characteristic that could be subject to discrimination.

title: Lead Piping Engineer
description:
Siamo **SICIM**, un’azienda familiare con Headquarter a **Parma** e Hub di Engineering e Procurement a **Milano**. Sicim da oltre 60 anni realizza progetti nel settore dell’energia su larga scala. Grazie ad una solida presenza internazionale, operiamo in più di 20 paesi distribuiti su quattro continenti e contiamo più di 10\.000 collaboratori. Specializzati nei servizi EPC (Engineering, Procurement, Construction), la nostra missione è supportare i clienti nella progettazione e costruzione di infrastrutture e impianti sostenibili, contribuendo attivamente alla transizione energetica.

  

  

**Posizione:**
--------------

Il/La Lead Piping Engineer è responsabile del coordinamento e dell’integrità tecnica di tutte le attività di ingegneria della propria disciplina, dalla fase di offerta fino alla progettazione di dettaglio e al completamento del progetto.


Garantisce che i deliverable di disciplina siano sviluppati in conformità ai requisiti contrattuali, alle specifiche di progetto, agli standard di qualità e alle tempistiche previste.


La persona selezionata si occuperà di coordinare la progettazione e lo sviluppo dei sistemi di piping, dei layout e dei disegni isometrici. Supervisionare la selezione dei materiali, l’integrità del modello 3D e la risoluzione delle interferenze. Gestire le attività di analisi delle sollecitazioni (stress analysis) e la progettazione dei supporti, garantendo un funzionamento sicuro e conforme alle normative. Collaborare strettamente con le discipline di processo, meccanica e civile per assicurare una progettazione d’impianto integrata, realizzabile e in linea con i requisiti di progetto e le normative applicabili.


Inoltre, è responsabile di:

* Analizzare e interpretare i requisiti contrattuali e tecnici, sia in fase di offerta che in fase esecutiva.
* Definire e mantenere la lista dei documenti di disciplina (disegni, datasheet, specifiche, calcoli, ecc.).
* Supportare il Dipartimento Commerciale nella stima delle ore di ingegneria in fase di gara.
* Preparare i contributi tecnici di disciplina per la documentazione d’offerta.

* Staffare i progetti assegnando le risorse tecniche adeguate e fornendo loro guida e supervisione nello sviluppo dell’ingegneria di dettaglio.
* Preparare la documentazione tecnica per le richieste d’offerta ai fornitori (Material Requisition, RFQ, datasheet, specifiche).
* Partecipare alla valutazione tecnica e all’allineamento delle offerte dei fornitori.
* Seguire lo sviluppo dell’ingegneria di dettaglio dei fornitori (vendor follow\-up), revisionando i documenti e assicurandone la corretta integrazione con il progetto.
* Coordinarsi con le altre discipline per gestire le interfacce e risolvere le problematiche tecniche.
* Fornire supporto tecnico ai team di costruzione e di commissioning.
* Assicurare la preparazione e l’emissione della documentazione As Built.
* Mantenere gli standard, i template e le buone pratiche della disciplina, promuovendo il miglioramento continuo.
Contribuire alla raccolta delle lessons learned e alla capitalizzazione delle conoscenze tecniche tra i progetti.  
* 

  

**Requisiti:**
--------------

* Conoscenza delle dinamiche EPC maturata in contesti internazionali e con clienti top del mercato Oil and Gas
* Padronanza di software di modellazione 3D
* Conoscenza dei material e delle normative di settore
* Formazione: Laurea in Ingegneria Meccanica

title: Data Center Facility Engineer Italy
description:
The Facility Operations Engineer is a key role in the technical management of critical systems within a Data Center. The primary responsibility is to ensure the proper operation, operational continuity, and technical efficiency of electrical, mechanical, and safety systems through advanced monitoring, structured technical analysis, and technical coordination of suppliers.



This role does not involve design activities; instead, it is responsible for the engineering supervision of operations, analysis of infrastructure performance, technical assessment of anomalies, fault diagnosis, and management of maintenance activities in highly critical environments.

 **MAIN TECHNICAL RESPONSIBILITIES**


**Engineering Supervision and Technical Control**


* Continuous technical monitoring of critical systems: electrical (MV/LV, UPS, generator sets), mechanical (HVAC), fire protection, and security systems.
* Performance analysis through BMS/SCADA systems and early detection of anomalies or inefficiencies.
* Technical validation of routine, extraordinary, and corrective maintenance activities.

  


**Technical Incident Management**


* Technical coordination during infrastructure incidents and fault analysis.
* Preparation and validation of Root Cause Analyses (RCA), identifying underlying technical causes.
* Development and monitoring of corrective action plans for risk mitigation.

  


**Energy Monitoring and Data Analysis**


* Technical analysis of energy consumption and efficiency parameters (PUE, power demand, load profiles).
* Production of monthly technical reports and collaboration with Energy Management teams.
* Technical support during energy and environmental audits.

  


**Technical Coordination of Suppliers**

  

* Engineering supervision of activities carried out by external suppliers (FM providers, maintenance contractors, specialized technicians).
* Validation of operational procedures, technical dry runs, checklists, and MOPs/SOPs.
* Verification of compliance with technical, regulatory, and HSE standards.

  


**Support to Internal Functions**


* Collaboration with Critical Environment Managers, Service Delivery, and Compliance teams.
* Participation in technical committees, infrastructure reviews, failure simulations, and management of minor projects.
* Technical support during customer audits, certification processes, and inspection visits.

  


**REQUIREMENTS**


**Education**


* Degree in Electrical, Energy, Mechanical Engineering, or related fields.
* Experience in complex industrial or high\-availability environments (preferably Data Centers, Hospitals, or Critical Infrastructure).

  


**Technical Skills**


* Advanced knowledge of electrical systems (MV/LV), UPS, generators, HVAC, fire detection, and security systems.
* Proficiency in reading electrical diagrams, system logic diagrams, and functional schematics.
* Experience in technical fault analysis and advanced troubleshooting.
* Familiarity with regulations and standards (CEI 0\-16, CEI 64\-8, ISO 50001, ISO 27001, ISO 14001\).
* Knowledge of BMS/SCADA systems, technical data analysis, and diagnostic tools.
* Technical English, written and spoken.

  


**SOFT SKILLS**


* Strong analytical mindset and a structured approach to problem solving.
* Decision\-making ability in complex and high\-pressure situations.
* Team\-oriented attitude and ability to collaborate across disciplines.
* Strong sense of responsibility and technical ownership.
* Ability to communicate effectively with technical teams, suppliers, and customers.
* Precision, methodical approach, and a continuous improvement mindset.
* Availability for on\-call duty and on\-site presence when required.

title: Sr. Robotics System Integration & Deployment Engineer, RDPI - Robotics Delivery & Packaging Innovation
description:
**DESCRIPTION**
---------------


Amazon is seeking an experienced technical leader and Sr. Robotics System Integration \& Deployment Engineer to own the onsite strategy and execution of complex, first\-time automation deployments and build scalable mechanisms that enable global rollouts across our fulfillment network.  

  

Join our Robotics Delivery and Packaging Innovation International team, where we transform complex automation technologies into efficiently deployable solutions on a global scale.  

  

Ideal candidates will have deep experience leading complex automation deployments in undefined environments, combined with multi\-domain technical expertise and a track record of force\-multiplying team capability. You'll define deployment approaches where none exist, own the full deployment lifecycle from concept through go\-live and steady\-state handover, and build the frameworks, playbooks, and mechanisms that enable downstream teams to scale with limited direct oversight. You'll influence across multiple teams, advise senior leadership on deployment strategy and trade\-offs, and mentor junior engineers. Working across multiple technologies and regions will accelerate your impact through exposure to diverse stakeholders, regulatory environments, and technical challenges.  

  

Amazon's culture encourages an entrepreneurial approach and expects engineers and managers alike to take a high level of ownership in solving complex problems in a fast\-paced environment.  

  

The role could be based in Barcelona, London, Düsseldorf, Munich, Berlin or Milan with \~75% travel across Europe during peak deployment season, with occasional international travel.  

  

Key job responsibilities  

* Define and own the end\-to\-end deployment strategy and execution for complex, first\-time automation technologies where deployment processes do not yet exist
* Lead cross\-functional alignment across multiple teams, vendors, site operations, and regional stakeholders — advising Senior Managers and Directors on technical trade\-offs and deployment decisions
* Build scalable deployment mechanisms, frameworks, and tooling that convert first\-time deployment complexity into repeatable, organisation\-wide standards
* Resolve complex deployment problems across multiple technical domains, identifying when issues stem from technical design and providing actionable feedback to engineering teams
* Mentor and develop junior deployment engineers, perform technical assessments, and drive engineering best practices across the deployment organisation
* Evaluate and deliver large\-scale automation technologies including conveyance, sortation, and robotics systems across multiple countries and building types
* Automate and optimise deployment processes — moving beyond SOPs to eliminate waste, decouple dependencies, and create predictable deployment paths

  

A day in the life  

You'll define the deployment strategy for new automation technologies, making trade\-offs between short\-term delivery needs and long\-term scalability. During deployment execution, you'll be on\-site leading complex first\-time implementations through go\-live while simultaneously coaching your team and capturing learnings into scalable mechanisms.  

  

You will interact daily with diverse functional teams across multiple time zones, presenting to Directors and VPs, conducting regular meetings with internal teams, stakeholders, and vendors. You'll build relationships with subject matter experts, shape technical strategies, and influence deployment standards across regions. You'll foster constructive dialogue and build consensus on contentious deployment decisions. No two days will be the same in our fast\-paced environment, offering opportunities for professional growth as part of a collaborative, focused team.  

  

About the Team:  

Robotics Delivery \& Packaging Innovation is a diverse and multi\-talented team with a proven track record of overcoming challenging technical problems to deliver Amazon's leading\-edge robotics technologies in its fulfilment, transportation, and delivery network across the world. Our high\-performing team blends engineering know\-how, problem solving, curiosity, innovation, leadership, and effective communication to deliver positive results for our customers.  

  

About the team  

Robotics Delivery \& Packaging Innovation is a diverse and multi\-talented team with a proven track record of overcoming challenging technical problems to deliver Amazon's leading\-edge robotics technologies in its fulfilment, transportation, and delivery network across the world. Our high\-performing team blends engineering know\-how, problem solving, curiosity, innovation, leadership, and effective communication to deliver positive results for our customers.**BASIC QUALIFICATIONS**
------------------------

* Bachelor's degree or foreign equivalent in Information Science, Information Technology, Data Science, Computer Science, Engineering, Mathematics, Physics, or a related field
* Experience leading complex automation deployment projects end\-to\-end, including defining deployment strategies for new technologies where none previously existed
* Subject matter expertise in more than one technical domain (e.g., robotics \+ deployment process design, automation hardware \+ infrastructure integration, or conveyance \+ sortation systems)
* Demonstrated ability to influence across multiple teams and advise senior leadership on deployment strategy and technical trade\-offs
* Track record building scalable mechanisms, frameworks, or tooling adopted across an organisation
* Experience mentoring and developing engineers
* Strong written communication skills including authoring technical narratives and strategic documents
* Willingness to travel up to 50% during EU deployment seasons
* Experience resolving complex technical systems problems on\-site in undefined environments

**PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS**
----------------------------

* Experience with robotic deployments in warehouse or fulfillment environments across multiple countries
* Background managing vendor relationships and external contractors at programme level
* Knowledge of Lean Manufacturing, Six Sigma, or continuous improvement methodologies
* Project management certification (PMP, Scrum, Agile)
* Experience with Amazon Robotics or similar warehouse automation platforms
* Master's degree in engineering or related STEM field
* Experience training and developing field deployment teams at scale
* Multi\-country deployment experience with demonstrated ability to adapt processes across regulatory and operational environments
* Familiarity with infrastructure deployment automation systems

description:

Treasury Senior Specialist**The challenge**


An exciting opportunity has arisen to contribute to Haier Europe. The Company is on a journey to achieve ambitious growth and leadership objectives in the region, and we are seeking someone passionate, proactive, self\-driven, and motivated to join a team of open\-minded individuals. We are looking for someone who embodies the Company’s core behaviors, based on our Own It model: Zero Distance, Agility, Entrepreneurship, Ecosystem and Build Trust. A true change agent who acts with integrity, collaborates across boundaries, adapts quickly, takes initiative and keeps users at the center — fostering an open, innovative, and high\-performing environment.**What you will do**


We are seeking an experienced Senior Treasury Specialist with experience in corporate treasury, cash management, or treasury consulting. The ideal candidate will combine strong treasury expertise with proven project management capabilities, leading end\-to\-end treasury initiatives across multiple business functions and geographies.


This role will be responsible for driving treasury transformation projects, optimizing treasury processes, implementing banking and treasury management solutions, and supporting strategic initiatives aimed at enhancing liquidity, risk management, and operational efficiency.

* Lead Treasury Management System (TMS, Piteco, SAP) implementation and enhancement projects.

* Collaborate with IT teams to define system requirements, testing plans, and deployment activities.

* Knowledge of ERP environments such as SAP, Oracle, or Microsoft Dynamics.

Professional certifications (CTP, PMP, Prince2, or equivalent) are considered an advantage
